title: cleistocalyx cerasoides var. paniala
intro: Cleistocalyx cerasoides var. paniala, also known as the Paniala, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cleistocalyx cerasoides var. paniala include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
